text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking around<n>the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... I just arrived here from out of<n>town
today...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd take a little walk beforeorientation starts, but... Hic!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
HEY! Whatcha doin', makin' dat poor<n>girl cry?!
Explain yaself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Intimidated by Tamamo's accusing<n>glare, I
desperately try to defend<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So that's how it was, eh? My bad for<n>jumpin' to
conclusions.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, newbie. I came all the way out<n>here from
Osaka myself, so I totally<n>get how dauntin' it
must be for ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll take ya to the orientation!<n>I'll even
show ya where the real<n>important stuff happens
'round<n>campus along the way!
choice_data_list: Oh? Are you talking about the library?
Oh? Are you talking about the gym?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, ya gotta know where the library<n>is to
study!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Here we are. Now listen, ya gotta be<n>quiet in the
library—got it?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for your help. I can't believe<n>I'm already
getting help from an<n>underclassman.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You're only here for a campus tour,<n>but you're
so on top of things. I need<n>to be more like you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The hell you callin' anunderclassman?! Can't ya see thatI'm wearing the academy uniform?! You're my junior!

text_block_list.name: Student Librarian
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross! This is a library!<n>Please be quiet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, she's gonna be usin' it a lot<n>soon!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And we're here. When it comes to<n>equipment, if
ya can name it, it's here.<n>Make sure ya train up
your energy<n>and guts!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! I'll make sure to set a<n>good example
as your senior!
